# AIVA Shared Workspace Kernel

Functional workspace layer.

Boundary:
- No TOUR changes
- No FundTrackerAI changes
- No PAI-SAFE logic
- No custody promotion
- No S:\SOUL writes
- No payment logic

Features:
- Create workspace
- List workspaces
- Open workspace
- Rename workspace
- Archive workspace
- Track active workspace
- Add projects
- Add notes
- Add tasks
- Add events
- Add document placeholders
- Render governed status badges
- Persist locally with localStorage

Status values:
- draft
- active
- pending
- held
- review
- archived
